name: Animesh
roles: an AI Engineer @ Incedo with an experience of 1.5 years
a System Design and Scalability Enthusiast
bio: Software Development Engineer in Incedo's AI & Data division, Hyderabad. I build production GenAI systems , agentic workflows with LangGraph, RAG pipelines over vector stores, and the FastAPI backends that hold them up. My work is focused on building safe, scalable, efficient, and reliable AI systems that can handle large amounts of data and traffic, That essentially brings me to the junction of Computer Engineering and AI, I am open to Ideas, and I feel we are no longer limited by the constraints of our Tech-stack but by our creativity. Looking forward to meeting like-minded people and building something that can make a difference.
